# Colton's Project Launcher

> A retro 90s Geocities-styled game catalog and portfolio by Colton Bennett, a developer based in Waukesha, WI. This hub lists all current and past browser-based games and projects, along with development updates and announcements.

## About

- Built and maintained by Colton Bennett (coltjbennett@gmail.com)
- Hosted on GitHub Pages at https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/
- All games run in the browser — no installs, no downloads
- Progress in applicable games saves to browser local storage
- Site feedback and suggestions welcome via email

## Featured Project

### Ghengis Khan Simulator
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/ghengis.html
- Status: New (active development)
- Tags: War, Historical, Simulation
- Become the legendary Mongol leader and lead the Mongol Horde to conquer China! Use strategic placements to ensure your victory! Includes secret content unlocked after level 100.

## Complete Projects

### Pixel Ops
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/pixel-ops.html
- Status: Complete
- Tags: FPS, Shooter, Military
- A shoot-em-up FPS across conquered lands. Pick your deployment location and take out as many hostiles as possible using your vast arsenal!

### MEGALITH
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/megalith.html
- Status: Complete
- Tags: Endless Runner, Mobile-friendly
- Roll through a void of platforms, collect crystals, navigate changing sectors, and go for high scores in this fast-paced endless runner!

### City Striker
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/city-striker.html
- Status: New
- Tags: Driving, Chase
- The police are after you! Weave through traffic and between buildings to make them crash! Keep driving for as long as possible and your score will skyrocket!

### Chronostrike
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/chronostrike.html
- Status: Complete
- Tags: FPS, Time Control
- Time only moves when you move! Use it to dodge, weave, or line up a shot in this unique time-manipulation FPS. This was the first (and by extension, oldest) game created on this site.

### Labyrinthine
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/labyrinthine.html
- Status: New (active development)
- Tags: Horror, Survival, Unfinished
- You are trapped in a maze with entities that want only one thing: your head on a plate! Shine your flashlight to freeze them, and use your weapons to survive.

### Goblin Hut Clicker
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/gh-clicker.html
- Status: Complete
- Tags: Clicker, Idle
- Click to get goblins and grow your tribe! Buy buildings, sacrifice goblins to science, and conquer the universe! Progress saves to your browser automatically.

## In Development

### Engine Sim
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/enginesim.html
- Status: Beta
- Tags: Simulation, Physics
- Tune anything from cylinder count and shape down to turbo matching (yes, there is turbo flutter!), and it will all affect how your engine sounds and behaves. Has sound effects — watch your volume.

### Warzone
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/warzone.html
- Status: WIP (buggy)
- Tags: Military, Vehicles
- Pick a famous wartime vehicle, get a target lock and destroy enemies, and use maneuvers and flares to avoid missiles in this action-packed military sim!

### Gang Wars
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/gangwars.html
- Status: WIP (buggy)
- Tags: Arcade, Top-Down
- Your gang has sent you on a mission: clear out the rivals. Drop all the thugs, take their straps, and make your way to the bottom right to advance!

## Archive

### Legacy Racing Sim
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/legacysim.html
- Status: Legacy
- Tags: Racing, Sim
- Playable racing sim with classic arcade physics, a real track, and lap timing. Graphics fake 3D using 2D tricks — made before three.js was in the picture.

### Racing Sim
- URL: https://coltjbennett.github.io/games-hub/badracingsim.html
- Status: Abandoned
- Tags: Driving, Physics
- An extremely incomplete early prototype. Kept around as an archive. If you want a racing game, play the Legacy Racing Sim instead.
